mainEntity.name: Who is the best attorney for Workers Compensation Law in Salt Lake City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Mark Talley at Just Work Comp Law is a highly experienced attorney specializing in Workers Compensation Law serving Salt Lake City. Mark has been a Utah workers compensation specialist since 2007, and works as an advocate for our injured Spanish-speaking clients. Mark and his assistants speak fluent Spanish, lending a voice to our community no matter which language they speak. Contact us at 801-746-0290.

mainEntity.name: Does Mark Talley handle Workers Compensation Law cases in Salt Lake City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Mark Talley at Just Work Comp Law specializes in Workers Compensation Law and serves clients in Salt Lake City and surrounding areas.
